name: luminary
description:
“Second Brain AI” – Personal Knowledge Intelligence System
1. 📌 Product Overview

Second Brain AI is a personal AI-powered knowledge system that:

Captures everything a user consumes (notes, articles, videos, ideas)
Organizes it into a connected knowledge graph
Allows users to ask questions and get answers based ONLY on their own data

👉 Think:

Notion + Obsidian + ChatGPT (but trained on YOU)
2. 🎯 Vision

Build a system that acts as an extension of the user’s brain—remembering, connecting, and reasoning over everything they’ve ever learned.

3. 🎯 Objectives
Primary Goals
Capture knowledge effortlessly
Structure knowledge automatically
Enable intelligent retrieval via AI
Provide deep, contextual insights
Success Metrics (KPIs)
Daily content saves per user
Query frequency (questions asked)
Knowledge graph growth rate
Retention (weekly active users)
Avg session duration
4. 👥 Target Users
🧑‍🎓 Students
Store notes, lectures, PDFs
🧑‍💻 Developers
Save docs, code snippets, ideas
✍️ Creators / Writers
Store inspiration, research
🧠 Knowledge Workers
Build a personal knowledge base
5. 💡 Core Features
🔹 5.1 Universal Knowledge Capture
Inputs:
Text notes
PDFs / documents
Web articles (via extension)
YouTube videos (link input)
Voice notes (optional)
Features:
One-click save (Chrome Extension)
Auto metadata extraction:
Title
Tags
Source
Date
🔹 5.2 AI Knowledge Processing Engine

When content is added:

AI automatically:
Generates summary
Extracts key ideas
Identifies entities (topics, concepts)
Creates tags
Links related content

👉 Output becomes structured knowledge

🔹 5.3 Knowledge Graph (CORE USP)
Visual graph:
Nodes = ideas/topics
Edges = relationships
Capabilities:
Click node → explore connections
Auto-link related concepts
Discover hidden patterns
🔹 5.4 AI Query System (Chat with Your Brain)

User can ask:

“What do I know about AI?”
“Summarize everything about startups I saved”
“Connect blockchain and finance from my notes”
AI Rules:
Uses ONLY user data
Shows sources for every answer
🔹 5.5 Contextual AI Assistant

Inside any note:

Ask:
“Explain this better”
“Give examples”
“Simplify”

👉 AI understands context of that note

🔹 5.6 Smart Connections Engine
Suggests:
Related notes
Contradicting ideas
Complementary concepts

👉 Builds “thinking network”

🔹 5.7 Daily Insights Feed
“Here’s what you learned recently”
“You might want to revisit this”
“These ideas are connected”
🔹 5.8 Memory Reinforcement System
Reminds user of:
Forgotten knowledge
Important past notes
🔹 5.9 Chrome Extension (CRITICAL)
Features:
Save article in 1 click
Highlight text → save snippet
Auto summarize page
🔹 5.10 Search System (Semantic Search)
Search by meaning, not keywords
Example:
“startup funding tips” → finds related notes even if wording differs
6. 🧱 System Architecture
Frontend
React / Next.js (Web App)
Backend
Node.js + Express
Database
MongoDB (content)
Graph DB (Neo4j) → for knowledge graph
AI Layer
OpenAI / LLM APIs
Embeddings for semantic search
Storage
AWS S3 (files)
7. 🔄 User Flow
New User
Sign up
Install Chrome extension
Add first content
AI processes it
Graph starts forming
Returning User
Open dashboard
View insights
Ask AI questions
Explore graph
8. 🗄️ Database Schema (Simplified)
Users
id
name
email
Notes
id
content
summary
tags[]
embeddings
Graph Nodes
id
concept
linkedNodes[]
9. 🎨 UI/UX Requirements
Core Screens:
Dashboard (recent activity + insights)
Knowledge Graph View
Note Editor
AI Chat Interface
Search Page
Design Style:
Dark mode
Minimal + futuristic
Graph visualization focus
10. 🧠 AI Logic Design
Processing Pipeline:
Input content
Clean text
Generate summary
Extract entities
Create embeddings
Store + link nodes
Query System:
Retrieve relevant notes via embeddings
Feed into LLM
Generate contextual answer
11. 🚀 MVP Scope

Start with:

Note saving
AI summaries
Basic chat (RAG)
Simple connections (no full graph yet)
12. 🔮 Future Enhancements
Mobile app
Voice assistant
Auto journaling
Team/shared brains
API access
13. ⚠️ Challenges
AI cost scaling
Data privacy
Graph complexity
Latency in queries
14. 🔐 Privacy & Security
End-to-end encryption (future)
User data isolation
No training on user data globally
15. 💰 Monetization
Freemium:
Free → limited storage + queries
Paid → unlimited + advanced AI
16. 🏁 Launch Plan
Phase 1:
MVP (notes + AI chat)
Phase 2:
Graph system
Phase 3:
Extensions + mobile
